title: E10.W5 Run medium saga project dogfood

AC1_saga_5plus_epics_works.details: Saga T001 created with 6 epics (T002-T007). Saga list returns 1 saga. Saga members returns 6 members. Saga rollup works. Orchestrate ready (saga-level) returns 12 ready tasks across 6 member epics. Orchestrate waves (saga-level) returns 1 wave with all 12 tasks ready.

AC2_rollup_context_edges_scaffold_verifi.details: Saga rollup confirms 6/6 members. cleo show/list/focus/briefing/next all respond correctly. Parent-child containment works (cleo list --parent). Saga membership via groups relations works (cleo saga members).

AC3_docs_strict_dryrun_verified.details: --strict flag works on docs add (validated, attachment created successfully). --dry-run flag NOT yet wired at CLI level for docs add/update (E_UNKNOWN_FLAG). T10617 implemented dispatch-level dry-run semantics but CLI registration is pending. This is a legitimate dogfood finding.
AC3_docs_strict_dryrun_verified.gap: --dry-run CLI flag for docs add/update not yet registered

warnings: cleo orchestrate spawn T10641 fails with E_ATOMICITY_NO_SCOPE — expected for dogfood task with no source-file scope
docs add --dry-run not available at CLI level (dispatch-level only per T10617)
validation.recommendation: Saga system, orchestrate ready/waves (saga-level), and basic docs --strict work correctly at medium scale. Docs --dry-run CLI flag is a known pending item.
